title: About Home Cotton Rich Herringbone Blanket Throw, Settee Cover (Beige/Natural, 228x254 cm)
features: This contemporary Herringbone designed throw, constructed with cotton will provide plenty of warmth and good looks
Suitable for all generations, from the young to the more mature, with its delicate shades enhancing the depth and detail of the herringbone design
This durable, woven cotton Throw is great for indoor or outdoor use. The cotton blanket is versatile with a delicate herringbone design with fringes
It does not only brighten up your interior but also protects furniture from dust, dirt and animal hair and it is easy to clean as well
Chill out at home with this herringbone cotton throw blanket, it is super comfy and will keep you warm when you are all curled up in your sofa
description: From the manufacturer Cotton Herringbone Natural/Beige PVC Packing This herringbone throw comes in an attractive PVC packing with an ABOUT HOME belly band stating the details about the product. Herringbone Throw Two tone (Natural and Beige) These soft Herringbone throws with fringed edges are the premium quality 100% cotton throws ready to be laid on your settee or sofas, keep you warm and cosy. These can also be used as picnic rugs or can be used on the beach to lay on whilst getting a tan. Product Dimensions : 225 x 254 cm or 90" x 100" Approx.(Also available in other sizes) Product Color : Two tone Natural and Beige (Also available in other colors) Product Composition : 100% Cotton Machine Washable Let Your Sofa Stay Clean!!!! Love cuddling with your pet on the sofa? Then this is just the thing for you. Just spread this herringbone throw on any furniture and prevent it from dust or pet hair. So there you go, a comfort providing throw that makes your sofa look good and keeps it clean. AVAILABLE IN DIFFERENT COLORS Teal / Natural The two tones in this color are TEAL and Natural . Black / Natural The two tones in this colour are Black and Natural . Chocolate / Beige The two tones in this colour are Chocolate and Beige . Red / Natural The two tones in this colour are Red and Natural .
